title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 5: The Fight with Humbaba
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 5 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Gilgamesh and Enkidu defeat the guardian of the forest with the help of the sun god Shamash.
introduction: Tablet 5 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Gilgamesh and Enkidu defeat the guardian of the forest with the help of the sun god Shamash.

translation.text: Humbaba spoke to Gilgamesh: 'Let me go free, and I will be your servant.' But Enkidu said: 'Do not listen to him.'
